headline: Akamai Technologies Inc (NASDAQ:AKAM) Surges 24% After Hours Despite Q1 Earnings Miss and Cautious Outlook
summary: Akamai reported Q1 revenue of $1.074B with EPS of $1.61, slightly missing estimates. Despite a cautious Q2 outlook, surging after-hours trading pushed shares up over 24% as investors reacted positively to resilience in a challenging market.

headline: CoreWeave’s Stunning Rally Creates Prove-It Moment for Earnings
summary: (Bloomberg) -- CoreWeave Inc. shares are on a scorching run in 2026 as demand for computing capacity to power artificial intelligence keeps growing. But now investors want to see some proof that the neo-cloud provider is executing on its ambitious plans.
